offer: For law firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, delayed billing causes cash flow gaps. We provide a streamlined time tracking and billing solution instead of manual time tracking and billing software.
problem: timely billing leading to cash flow gaps
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to law firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among law firms
try_it: Let users try manual time entry and invoice generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
